Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}You lost consciousness after awakening to your "power."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Ooh, I see that it was Orpheus who heeded your call. Very interesting...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}That was the power of Persona... The manifestation of your psyche.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}A Persona is a facet of your personality that surfaces as you react to external stimuli...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}You can think of it as a mask that protects you as you brave many hardships.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}The power of a Persona is the power of one's soul... And the soul is fueled by the depth of one's bonds.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}As you form these bonds by becoming involved with others, your own Social Links will gradually develop.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}The strength of these Social Links will foster the growth of your Persona abilities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}I shouldn't keep you here any longer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 201 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Next time we meet, you will come here of your own accord.[n]{f 1 1}
